mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) LIMIT 1000
